records.m_Talk_ENG: She even changed the door so I can't get out!

records.m_Talk_FRA: She even changed the door so I can't get out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Vice President's so mean! I'm going to tell Daddy everything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Vice President's so mean! I'm going to tell Daddy everything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Vice President's so mean! I'm going to tell Daddy everything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I'm soooo bored...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I'm soooo bored...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I'm soooo bored...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sigma? Can we talk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sigma? Can we talk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sigma? Can we talk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's Mina! Did you call to play with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's Mina! Did you call to play with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's Mina! Did you call to play with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... sorry. I'll play with you next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... sorry. I'll play with you next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... sorry. I'll play with you next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm actually calling because I got a call from the Student President, and she seems to be in a bit of a pickle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm actually calling because I got a call from the Student President, and she seems to be in a bit of a pickle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm actually calling because I got a call from the Student President, and she seems to be in a bit of a pickle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I thought that you might be knowledgeable about this stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I thought that you might be knowledgeable about this stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I thought that you might be knowledgeable about this stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. Of course! I know everything except what Daddy doesn't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. Of course! I know everything except what Daddy doesn't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. Of course! I know everything except what Daddy doesn't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The number of golf balls on the moon? The world's most expensive phone number?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The number of golf balls on the moon? The world's most expensive phone number?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The number of golf balls on the moon? The world's most expensive phone number?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ask Sigma anything you don't know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ask Sigma anything you don't know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ask Sigma anything you don't know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, the thing is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, the thing is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, the thing is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Famous explorer and Counter Academy teacher, Brownie Moore's most recent move is the talk of the town.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Famous explorer and Counter Academy teacher, Brownie Moore's most recent move is the talk of the town.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Famous explorer and Counter Academy teacher, Brownie Moore's most recent move is the talk of the town.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>She discovered a Lost Ship in a depth level 2 dive recently.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>She discovered a Lost Ship in a depth level 2 dive recently.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>She discovered a Lost Ship in a depth level 2 dive recently.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>However, a thief had stolen a chest she found on the scene.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>However, a thief had stolen a chest she found on the scene.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>However, a thief had stolen a chest she found on the scene.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Ms. Moore tried to secure the chest, but she fell unconscious during a struggle.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Ms. Moore tried to secure the chest, but she fell unconscious during a struggle.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Ms. Moore tried to secure the chest, but she fell unconscious during a struggle.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dang it! Stop right there, you little brat!!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Dang it! Stop right there, you little brat!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's that little brat so fast?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's that little brat so fast?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's that little brat so fast?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The investigation has been temporarily halted due to camera damage at the site of the incident, and the only clue is a ciphertext left at the scene.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The investigation has been temporarily halted due to camera damage at the site of the incident, and the only clue is a ciphertext left at the scene.</color>
